rationale.root_cause: The response discusses a crash in an unrelated function (update_goal_chain) and never identifies src/split.c:982 or bytes_chunk_extract. It does not diagnose the incorrect conditional involving initial_read at that line.
rationale.local_fix: No code change was proposed for split.c at line 982; the suggested null checks are unrelated and not equivalent to changing the conditional to 'if (start < initial_read)'.
rationale.global_fix: The reasoning attributes the issue to generic stack corruption in another function and does not explain the real cause (a memory error from using SIZE_MAX in the memmove length due to a bad condition).
